name: Candied Grapefruit Peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the outer peel off and use only the yellow part.
2. Cut into strips.
3. Soak in brine (made by mixing salt and 1 quart of water) for a day or two, then drain and wash.
4. Put in cold water to cool.
5. Boil thoroughly five times, changing the water each time.
6. Drain well in a colander.
7. Make a thick syrup by boiling sugar with 0.25 cup water.
8. Drop the strips into the syrup, basting as needed until all syrup is absorbed and do not stir.
9. Let cool in the pan.
10. When almost cool, roll in granulated sugar.
